bookingId.title: Booking Id
bookingId.description: Id of the Test_Drive__c record. If unknown, call TDD_Get_Bookings to find it.

outcome.title: Outcome
outcome.description: Customer interest level. Valid values: Very Interested, Interested, Undecided, Not Interested.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-form sales rep notes about the drive.

nextAction.title: Next Action
nextAction.description: Recommended follow-up: Send Quote, Send Brochure, Schedule Follow-up, Schedule Second Drive, None.

competitor.title: Competitor
competitor.description: Competing brand mentioned (e.g. BMW i7, Tesla Model S). Blank if none.
